endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Authorization/operations
endpoints.description: Lists all of the available Microsoft.Authorization REST API operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/locks
endpoints.description: Gets all the management locks for a subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/locks/{lockName}
endpoints.description: Gets a management lock at the subscription level.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCKNAME}} with a real lockname.

endpoints.name: Creates or updates a management lock at the subscription level.
endpoints.description: When you apply a lock at a parent scope, all child resources inherit the same lock. To create management locks, you must have access to Microsoft.Authorization/* or Microsoft.Authorization/locks/* actions. Of the built-in roles, only Owner and User Access Administrator are granted those actions.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCKNAME}} with a real lockname.

endpoints.name: Deletes the management lock at the subscription level.
endpoints.description: To delete management locks, you must have access to Microsoft.Authorization/* or Microsoft.Authorization/locks/* actions. Of the built-in roles, only Owner and User Access Administrator are granted those actions.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCKNAME}} with a real lockname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/locks
endpoints.description: Gets all the management locks for a resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/locks/{lockName}
endpoints.description: Gets a management lock at the resource group level.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{LOCKNAME}} with a real lockname.

endpoints.name: Creates or updates a management lock at the resource group level.
endpoints.description: When you apply a lock at a parent scope, all child resources inherit the same lock. To create management locks, you must have access to Microsoft.Authorization/* or Microsoft.Authorization/locks/* actions. Of the built-in roles, only Owner and User Access Administrator are granted those actions.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{LOCKNAME}} with a real lockname.

endpoints.name: Deletes a management lock at the resource group level.
endpoints.description: To delete management locks, you must have access to Microsoft.Authorization/* or Microsoft.Authorization/locks/* actions. Of the built-in roles, only Owner and User Access Administrator are granted those actions.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{LOCKNAME}} with a real lockname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/{resourceProviderNamespace}/{parentResourcePath}/{resourceType}/{resourceName}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/locks
endpoints.description: Gets all the management locks for a resource or any level below resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENTRESOURCEPATH}} with a real parentresourcepath. Replace {{RESOURCETYPE}} with a real resourcetype. Replace {{RESOURCEPROVIDERNAMESPACE}} with a real resourceprovidernamespace. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/{resourceProviderNamespace}/{parentResourcePath}/{resourceType}/{resourceName}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/locks/{lockName}
endpoints.description: Get the management lock of a resource or any level below resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENTRESOURCEPATH}} with a real parentresourcepath. Replace {{RESOURCETYPE}} with a real resourcetype. Replace {{RESOURCEPROVIDERNAMESPACE}} with a real resourceprovidernamespace. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{LOCKNAME}} with a real lockname.

endpoints.name: Creates or updates a management lock at the resource level or any level below the resource.
endpoints.description: When you apply a lock at a parent scope, all child resources inherit the same lock. To create management locks, you must have access to Microsoft.Authorization/* or Microsoft.Authorization/locks/* actions. Of the built-in roles, only Owner and User Access Administrator are granted those actions.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENTRESOURCEPATH}} with a real parentresourcepath. Replace {{RESOURCETYPE}} with a real resourcetype. Replace {{RESOURCEPROVIDERNAMESPACE}} with a real resourceprovidernamespace. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{LOCKNAME}} with a real lockname.

endpoints.name: Deletes the management lock of a resource or any level below the resource.
endpoints.description: To delete management locks, you must have access to Microsoft.Authorization/* or Microsoft.Authorization/locks/* actions. Of the built-in roles, only Owner and User Access Administrator are granted those actions.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENTRESOURCEPATH}} with a real parentresourcepath. Replace {{RESOURCETYPE}} with a real resourcetype. Replace {{RESOURCEPROVIDERNAMESPACE}} with a real resourceprovidernamespace. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{LOCKNAME}} with a real lockname.

endpoints.name: GET /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/locks
endpoints.description: Gets all the management locks for a scope.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.

endpoints.name: GET /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/locks/{lockName}
endpoints.description: Get a management lock by scope.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope. Replace {{LOCKNAME}} with a real lockname.

endpoints.name: PUT /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/locks/{lockName}
endpoints.description: Create or update a management lock by scope.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope. Replace {{LOCKNAME}} with a real lockname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/locks/{lockName}
endpoints.description: Delete a management lock by scope.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope. Replace {{LOCKNAME}} with a real lockname.
